story.title: Inventory page footer shows the current year
story.description: A small, routine UI tweak: the footer on the inventory page should display the current calendar year next to the company name. A textbook lite-track story — a cosmetic, low-risk display change.

acceptance_criteria: The inventory page footer shows the current four-digit year.
The year updates automatically when the calendar year changes (no code edit needed).

risks.description: A stale or wrong year makes the site look unmaintained.

qa_scope_approved.notes: Lite track: Gates 1+2 consolidated. AC accurate, the single low risk is covered, the one test case is a justified automate_e2e smoke check. No red-domain exposure; track_floor is lite.

gate_decisions.notes: Lite consolidation of Gates 1 and 2 in one sitting; Gates 3 and 4 will still be recorded separately.
